_publications._publicationTitle: Therapeutic Vulnerability to ATR Inhibition in Concurrent

_contextSnippet: Oral administration of the ATR inhibitor, AZD6738, decreased growth transiently in ATRX-deficient U251 xenografts, while the combination of temozolomide plus AZD6738 had a more pronounced and persistent inhibitory effect
details: Decreased growth transiently in ATRX-deficient U251 xenografts, with more pronounced and persistent effect when combined with temozolomide
